HGSS.460.0000:
Kanto’s Power Plant?\f
It’s near the end of Route 9, the road
that heads east from here.\f
I think there was an accident of
some sort there.
HGSS.460.0001:
You’re collecting every single kind
of Pokémon?\f
That must be quite a challenge, but
it sounds fun, too.
HGSS.460.0002:
The cape in the north is a good
place for dates.\f
Girls like it!\f
Just between you and me...
Misty, the Gym Leader, is sometimes\r
there at the cape.\f
Guess I don’t stand a chance!
HGSS.460.0004: SLOWBRO is full of the fighting spirit!
HGSS.460.0005:
My SLOWBRO and I make an
awesome combination!\f
SLOWBRO, show me your Psychic!\f
...!
SLOWBRO’s Psychic hits hard!
HGSS.460.0006:
This shady character asked me just now
how to get to the Power Plant.\f
He said it must be kept
“...confidential.”\f
What does that mean?
HGSS.460.0007:
A shady character sneaked into
the Gym! What business does\r
he have with Misty?
HGSS.460.0008:
I saw this shady guy in black go
off toward the Cape.
HGSS.460.0009: I’m a huge fan of Cerulean Gym’s Misty.
HGSS.460.0010:
I heard of a cave here that had
horribly powerful Pokémon in it.\r
That’s why I came here.\f
HGSS.460.0011:
Ayuh?\f
My Dowsing Machine is responding...
HGSS.460.0012:
This is...
The notorious Cerulean Cave!\f
Horribly powerful Pokémon live here.
Only those who have defeated all eight\r
Kanto Gym Leaders are allowed to\r
challenge it.
HGSS.460.0013:
Cerulean City
The Floral Lagoon City
HGSS.460.0014:
Cerulean City Pokémon Gym
Leader: Misty\r
The Tomboyish Mermaid
HGSS.460.0015:
Trendsetter of the Bicycle Boom\f
Cerulean Bike Main Shop
HGSS.460.0016:
There’s a notice here...\f
Stamp out thievery and make the city
a friendlier, more cheerful place!\r
Cerulean Police

Rt. 24 Ahead
East to Cerulean Cape
